sivage.hud.limit_reached: Please wait for the previous image to finish generating.
sivage.hud.image_limit_reached: You can only have %s Sivage images placed at a time.
sivage.chat.permission.create: You do not have permission to create Sivage images.
sivage.chat.permission.edit: You do not have permission to edit Sivage images.
sivage.chat.permission.remove: You do not have permission to remove Sivage images.
sivage.chat.permission.check: You do not have permission to inspect Sivage images.
sivage.chat.signature.error.entity: Entity must be an Custom Image
sivage.chat.signature.error.data: Data of Custom Image seems invalid
sivage.chat.signature.header: Custom Image at [%s] has the following signature:
sivage.chat.signature.creator: - Created by: %s
sivage.chat.item.multiple: Gave Custom Image item to %s players
sivage.chat.images.deleted: Deleted %s Sivage image(s) with %s frame(s) for %s.
sivage.chat.images.unknown_user: Unknown player '%s'. Use an online player name or UUID.
sivage.dialog.blocked.title: Failed to Display Image!
sivage.dialog.blocked.description: The entered URL has been blocked by the server.
sivage.dialog.blocked.hint: HINT: Check which sources are allowed or ask an admin for further details.
sivage.dialog.exception.title: Uncaught exception!
sivage.dialog.exception.description: Something went wrong while trying to generate the image. Sorry!
sivage.dialog.exception.hint: Your item has been refunded. Please report this to the Sivage mod with server logs!
sivage.dialog.failed_file.title: Failed to Display Image!
sivage.dialog.failed_file.description: The server was not able to use the contents of the provided URL.
sivage.dialog.failed_file.hint: HINT: Make sure the URL is pointing to a file directly (a download link) and that said file is an image of one of the supported formats: PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, BMP, ICO, QOI, TIFF, FF, HDR & TGA
sivage.dialog.failed_link.title: Failed to Display Image!
sivage.dialog.failed_link.description: The entered URL could not be opened.
sivage.dialog.failed_link.hint: HINT: Make sure the URL starts with 'https://' and directly downloads an image, when pasting inside a browser.
sivage.dialog.new.title: Create New Image
sivage.dialog.new.description: Enter a link pointing towards an image file directly.
sivage.dialog.prepare.title: Preparing Image…
sivage.dialog.too_large.title: Failed to Display Image!
sivage.dialog.too_large.description: The requested image is too large!
sivage.dialog.too_large.hint: HINT: Scale down the image beforehand to a reasonable size; Without a frame, each block has a resolution of 128 x 128 pixels. The frame takes up 8 pixels on each side.
